description:
Offered: Spring
In this advanced research methods course, students will actively explore the principles and procedures of motivational science. Students will design, conduct, and analyze biological, learned, and cognitive components of motivation with the goal of writing a complete APA-style lab report.
Prerequisite(s): PSY 2040 or PSY 2000 or by permission of instructor
Pre/Concurrent: PSY 3530
prerequisites: PSY 2040 or PSY 2000 or by permission of instructor
